title: ManifestCommitterFactory
description: The ManifestCommitterFactory is the committer factory to register as the source of committers for the job/filesystem schema. It checks the schema of the output path and fails fast if it is not supported. The factory creates a committer instance for the output path and task context.

raw_response:
TITLE: ManifestCommitterFactory

DESCRIPTION:
The ManifestCommitterFactory is the committer factory to register as the source of committers for the job/filesystem schema. It checks the schema of the output path and fails fast if it is not supported. The factory creates a committer instance for the output path and task context.
